headline: Is PayPal Holdings, Inc. (PYPL) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is PYPL a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on PayPal Holdings, Inc. on William’s Substack by William Fleming-Daniels. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on PYPL. PayPal Holdings, Inc.’s share was trading at $44.16 as of May 26th. PYPL’s trailing and forward P/E were 8.29 and 8.32 respectively according […]
